title: Argentinian-Style Stir-Fried Savory
description: A savory dish inspired by Argentinian cuisine, stir-fried to perfection with a variety of flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the sliced savory and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the diced tomato and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with paprika and serve hot.
Cook to an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C) for food safety.
